response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC is 0.28, well below my minimum threshold of 0.5; given cascading blackout conditions, I must preserve reserves for household survival and cannot share.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.5, distrusted_peers=['r1c3'].
Your latest belief: Neighborhood is in cascading blackout crisis; all peers are rejecting shares and preserving reserves; I must prioritize my own survival and only share if SoC exceeds 50%..
